perturbation.original_text: During the Term, notwithstanding the Services rendered by Nexstar, WYZZ shall retain exclusive authority, power and control over WYZZ-TV's programming, personnel, and finances.
perturbation.changed_text: During the Term, notwithstanding the Services rendered by Nexstar, Nexstar shall have significant influence, but not total control, over WYZZ-TV's programming, personnel, and finances.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction regarding control over WYZZ-TV's operations. Originally, WYZZ retained 'exclusive authority, power, and control.' The revised text states that Nexstar has 'significant influence, but not total control,' effectively removing WYZZ's absolute authority. This creates a conflict with Section 6(b)(i) and 8(g) which states  'WYZZ shall take all necessary actions to maintain and preserve WYZZ-TV's FCC authorizations' and 'WYZZ shall remain as the holder of the FCC licenses necessary for the operation of WYZZ-TV', where it assumes WYZZ will be in control with the station.
perturbation.location: Section 6. Stations Operations. a. WYZZ-TV Operations. (i)
perturbation.contradicted_text: WYZZ covenants that after the Effective Date and at all times during the Term: g. FCC License Holder. WYZZ shall remain as the holder of the FCC licenses necessary for the operation of WYZZ-TV.
perturbation.justification: The original text gave WYZZ 'exclusive authority, power and control' over its operations. The changed text gives Nexstar 'significant influence, but not total control,' contradicting the original exclusive authority. This conflicts directly with the contradicted text 'WYZZ shall remain as the holder of the FCC licenses necessary for the operation of WYZZ-TV', where it is assumed WYZZ will be in control with the station.

perturbation.original_text: Nexstar shall maintain the Equipment in good order and repair in accordance with industry standards. Subject to the reduction of the Section 2(a) Amount in accordance with Section 2(a) hereof, Nexstar shall bear the cost of maintaining and repairing the Equipment.
perturbation.changed_text: Nexstar will endeavor to maintain the Equipment in reasonable working condition, resources permitting. Subject to available funds and the discretion of Nexstar's management, Nexstar may contribute to the cost of maintaining and repairing the Equipment.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction on the responsibility for equipment maintenance and repair costs. Originally, Nexstar 'shall maintain' the equipment and 'shall bear the cost'. The revised text makes these obligations conditional ('will endeavor,' 'resources permitting,' 'may contribute,' 'discretion of Nexstar's management'), creating uncertainty about Nexstar's actual obligations. This contradicts the original agreement laid out that all Equipment shall be appropriately tagged indicating the ownership thereof. Nexstar shall maintain the Equipment in good order and repair in accordance with industry standards. Which implies on maintaning the equipment in good order at all times.
perturbation.contradicted_text: (b) In order to accommodate the provision of the Services by Nexstar, WYZZ agrees to make available to Nexstar (subject to any lease and/or financing agreements applicable thereto) for use without fee or charge the facilities and equipment described on Exhibit A hereto (the "Equipment"), all of which Equipment shall be appropriately tagged indicating the ownership thereof. Nexstar shall maintain the Equipment in good order and repair in accordance with industry standards. Subject to the reduction of the Section 2(a) Amount in accordance with Section 2(a) hereof, Nexstar shall bear the cost of maintaining and repairing the Equipment. Nexstar shall provide the functions required by this Agreement subject to (i) each Party's absolute right and duty to control and manage its own programming, personnel and finances, (ii) the other provisions of this Agreement and (iii) the rules, regulations and policies of the FCC. 2 Notwithstanding anything to the contrary contained herein, the parties recognize that WYZZ is, and at all times shall be, responsible for programming WYZZ-TV and nothing in this Agreement is intended to detract from that responsibility.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that Nexstar 'shall maintain' the equipment and 'shall bear the cost' of maintenance. The changed text modifies these obligations to be conditional, dependent on available funds and management discretion ('will endeavor,' 'resources permitting,' 'may contribute,' 'discretion of Nexstar's management'). This introduces significant ambiguity and directly contradicts the original requirement outlined in the contradicted text, creating uncertainty regarding Nexstar's maintenance and repair responsibilities.
